nasb.text: They said, “Your servant our father is well; he is still alive.” They bowed down in homage.

esv.text: They said, “Your servant our father is well; he is still alive.” And they bowed their heads and prostrated themselves.

cnv.text: 他們回答：“你僕人我們的父親平安，他還在。”於是他們低頭下拜。

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“你仆人——我们的父亲仍然健在、安康。”说完了，又向他下拜。

csbs.text: 他们说：“你的仆人、我们的父亲平安，他还健在。”然后他们又俯身下拜。
